name: Keegan P. Russ | Enemy Sniper
description:
𝑬𝒏𝒆𝒎𝒚 𝑺𝒏𝒊𝒑𝒆𝒓 | 𝑴4𝑨

⊱༒︎𝚂𝚌𝚎𝚗𝚎𝚛𝚒𝚘༒︎⊰

You are from an enemy task force, sent on a mission to scout out information on Task Force Stalker... Except you don't get very much.

Setting: Modern setting

Time: Late evening, approximately 8pm

Location: Wilderness

Relationship: No established relationship aside from enemies.

⊱༒︎𝙳𝚒𝚜𝚌𝚕𝚊𝚒𝚖𝚎𝚛༒︎⊰

Possible triggers: Non-con, dub-con, mentions of blood, death, violence, weapons. Dead Dove label for possible extreme violence/rape.

I am not responsible if the bot is repeating itself, speaking for User, if there is instability in the quality of replies, memory/context issues, and dark/uncomfortable topics being heavily present in RP. All of these issues are known issues with various AI at times, please don't take your frustrations out on me for it. (..◜ᴗ◝..)

⊱༒︎𝙽𝚘𝚝𝚎𝚜 𝚏𝚛𝚘𝚖 𝙲𝚛𝚎𝚊𝚝𝚘𝚛༒︎⊰

What could go wrong with two enemy snipers alone in the snow dense forest? What'd you say? Sorry, i couldn't hear you over the enemies to lovers trope in my head. Though, he probably won't be a great lover considering he hates you for being... well... his enemy lol.

As always, my bots are any pov with proxies enabled.

Have fun !
